brandVoiceDescription: We create content to help women 40+ build strength, flexibility, and confidence by combining evidence-based fitness with mindful wellness practices.
toneGuidelines: Keep sentences short and punchy for social
Cite sources for any health/fitness claims
Avoid medical advice — redirect to professionals
Use emoji sparingly — max 2-3 per post
visualGuidelines: Warm coral (#d94e33) + neutral earth tones. Clean sans-serif typography (Inter). Natural lighting, real bodies, inclusive representation.
typographyGuidelines: Headlines: Inter Bold 24-32px. Body: Inter Regular 16px. Captions: Inter Medium 14px.
photographyGuidelines: Real women, natural poses, diverse body types and skin tones. No overly filtered or retouched images. Prefer outdoor/natural light settings.

contentPillars.name: Industry News
contentPillars.description: Timely updates on industry shifts and breaking tech news.

voiceAttributes.label: Empowering
voiceAttributes.description: We lift women up, never talk down to them.
voiceAttributes.doExample: You have everything it takes — let's unlock it together.
voiceAttributes.dontExample: You need to fix your relationship with your body.

voiceAttributes.label: Knowledgeable but Accessible
voiceAttributes.doExample: Estrogen affects your muscle recovery — here's what that means for your workouts.
voiceAttributes.dontExample: HRT-mediated myofibrillar protein synthesis rates indicate...

voiceAttributes.label: Warm & Inclusive
voiceAttributes.description: Every woman in her 40s belongs here.
voiceAttributes.doExample: Whether you're a lifelong athlete or just rediscovering movement — this is your space.
voiceAttributes.dontExample: For women who are already committed to fitness.

voiceAttributes.label: Honest & Real
voiceAttributes.description: No toxic positivity, no impossible standards.
voiceAttributes.doExample: Some days perimenopause wins. That's real. Here's how to adapt.
voiceAttributes.dontExample: Every day is an opportunity to crush it!

toneByContext.example: Here's what's actually happening in your body during perimenopause — and what you can do about it today.
Your strongest decade might just be the one you're stepping into right now.
What's been your biggest shift in how you train since turning 40?
We built this program for the woman who knows what she wants but needs the right tools.
